author: barnabasbusa
content: oh right there is another circular dependency issue with builder flag

author: barnabasbusa
content: lol

author: barnabasbusa
content: so I'm trying to make sure the client without an EL will be able to still build blocks by enabling flashbots builder

author: barnabasbusa
content: but this auto appends --builder

author: barnabasbusa
content: The --builder flag requires --execution-endpoint. And in your config, the el_type: None participant is getting  --builder=http://mev-boost-3-lighthouse-none:18550 appended (because MEV is enabled globally), which then requires --execution-endpoint.

author: barnabasbusa
content: can you disable this in your fork please?

author: taulepton_
content: yep I can do
